zh.lifeSummary: 當Godfried I van Cuijk於1100年出生時，他的父親Hendrik I van Cuijk van Malsen29歲，母親Alveradis von Hochstaden25歲。他於大約1126年與Ida von Arnsberg在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫霍賀紹藍德可萊斯阿斯格結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1167年在荷蘭努-布拉班特格拉福享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Godfried I van Cuijk于1100年出生时，他的父亲Hendrik I van Cuijk van Malsen29岁，母亲Alveradis von Hochstaden25岁。他于大约1126年与Ida von Arnsberg在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫霍賀紹藍德可萊斯阿斯格结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1167年在荷兰努-布拉班特格拉福享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

en.lifeSummary: When Godfried I van Cuijk was born in 1100, his father, Hendrik I van Cuijk van Malsen, was 29 and his mother, Alveradis von Hochstaden, was 25. He married Ida von Arnsberg about 1126, in Arnsberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1167, in Grave, North Brabant, Netherlands, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Godfried I van Cuijk est né en 1100, son père, Hendrik I van Cuijk van Malsen, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Alveradis von Hochstaden, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Ida von Arnsberg environ 1126, à Arnsberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1167, à Grave, Brabant-septentrional, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Godfried I van Cuijk 1100 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hendrik I van Cuijk van Malsen 29 und seine Mutter Alveradis von Hochstaden 25. Er hat um 1126 in Arnsberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland Ida von Arnsberg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1167 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Grave, Nord-Brabant, Niederlande.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Godfried I van Cuijk è nato il nel 1100, il suo padre, Hendrik I van Cuijk van Malsen, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Alveradis von Hochstaden, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Ida von Arnsberg circa 1126, nel Arnsberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1167, nel Grave, Brabante settentrionale, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Godfried I van Cuijkが1100年に生まれた時，父Hendrik I van Cuijk van Malsenは29歳，母Alveradis von Hochstadenは25歳であった。約1126年にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンホーチサウエルランドクレイスアルンスバーグでIda von Arnsbergと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1167年にオランダノオルド-ブラバントグラブで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Godfried I van Cuijk(이)가 1100년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hendrik I van Cuijk van Malsen(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Alveradis von Hochstaden(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1126년 독일 노르드하이-베스트파렌 호크소를랜드크레이스 아른스버그에서 Ida von Arnsberg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1167년 네덜란드 노르드-브라반트 그레이브에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Cuijk, Nederland: Cuijk, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Godfried I van Cuijk nasceu em 1100, seu pai, Hendrik I van Cuijk van Malsen, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Alveradis von Hochstaden, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Ida von Arnsberg aproximadamente 1126, em Arnsberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1167, em Grave, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Godfried I van Cuijk родился в 1100 г., его отцу по имени Hendrik I van Cuijk van Malsen было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Alveradis von Hochstaden, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Ida von Arnsberg около 1126 г. в местности арнсбирг, хочсауирландкрис, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1167 г. в местности грав, нурд-брабант, Нидерланды в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Godfried I van Cuijk nació en 1100, su papá, Hendrik I van Cuijk van Malsen, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Alveradis von Hochstaden, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Ida von Arnsberg aproximadamente 1126, en Arnsberg, Hochsauerlandkreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1167, en Grave, Brabante del Norte, Países Bajos, a la edad de 67 años.
